mapper.insert: INSERT INTO falconx_market_analytics.quote_tick ( symbol, source, bid_price, ask_price, mid_price, mark_price, event_time ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{source}, #{bidPrice}, #{askPrice}, #{midPrice}, #{markPrice}, #{eventTime} )

INSERT INTO falconx_market_analytics.quote_tick ( symbol, source, bid_price, ask_price, mid_price, mark_price, event_time ) VALUES
( #{record.symbol}, #{record.source}, #{record.bidPrice}, #{record.askPrice}, #{record.midPrice}, #{record.markPrice}, #{record.eventTime} )
